prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A whimsical tree where the trunk is labeled with the project root name. Main branches represent top-level directories: "src/" (largest branch, green), "tests/" (medium branch, blue), "config/" (small branch, orange). From the "src/" branch, sub-branches sprout for "models/", "services/", "utils/". Each sub-branch has leaf-shaped file icons: ".ts" files as green leaves, ".json" files as orange leaves. The root has "package.json" and "tsconfig.json" as acorns at the base. A bird labeled "main.ts" sits at the top of the src branch. The tree looks healthy and well-organized.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
